FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Zones/Plans
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Flesh growth areas and colony construction plans.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Hemogel farm
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Organs that create hemogel from digestion, photosynthesis, and aquatic filtering.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Production
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Organs that produce, process, store, or refine resources.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Auxiliary
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Utility organs that stabilize and maintain the colony.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Anomaly
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Living containment organs for captured entities.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Defense
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Organs grown to maim, repel, or consume intruders.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Reproduction
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Organs that grow, incubate, or command living defenders.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Plants
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Living colony flora grown directly from flesh terrain.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Transport
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Organs that move the colony through flesh and distance.

FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.label: Flesh moon
FB.FleshArchitectCategoryDef.description: Functions sustained by the permanent link to the flesh moon.
